heading: Injunctive enforcement and seizure
label: 2071 Injunctive enforcement and seizure
notes: Amendments1976—Subsec. (a). , §§ 11(b), 12(c)(1), designated existing provision as par. (1) and (3), added par. (2), and in provision following par. children.text: Restrain any violation of .section 2068 of this title

Restrain any person from manufacturing for sale, offering for sale, distributing in commerce, or importing into the United States a product in violation of an order in effect under .section 2064(d) of this title
Restrain any person from distributing in commerce a product which does not comply with a consumer product safety rule.
